landlordContract.pageSubtitle: Manage legal agreements for your rental portfolio.
landlordContract.noContractsText: You don't have any lease contracts in your portfolio yet.
landlordContract.clause1Text: The rented property is located at {{address}}. It consists of the unit specified in the property records ({{type}}).
landlordContract.clause2Text: The contract starts on {{startDate}} and has a duration of {{duration}}. It does not automatically renew unless a new agreement is signed by both parties.
landlordContract.clause3Text: The monthly rent amount is {{amount}}. The lessee must pay the rent in advance at the beginning of each month and receive a receipt from the lessor or through the platform.
landlordContract.clause4Text: A security deposit of {{deposit}} is paid by the lessee to the lessor. It will be refunded at the end of the contract if there are no valid claims against it for damages or unpaid bills.
landlordContract.clause5Text: If the lessee delays rent payment for more than 5 days, a late fee of {{lateFee}} shall apply. If the delay continues for a specified period, the contract is automatically terminated.
landlordContract.clause6Text: The lessee cannot sublease the property or make structural changes without the written consent of the lessor. Violating this clause results in automatic contract termination.
landlordContract.clause7Text: The property must be used for residential purposes only. Any other use terminates the contract automatically.
landlordContract.clause8Text: Any expenses incurred by the lessee (e.g., painting, decorating, or improvements) are not reimbursable by the lessor and become part of the property unless otherwise agreed.
landlordContract.clause9Title: 9. Returning the Property in Its Original Condition
landlordContract.clause9Text: The lessee must return the property in the same condition as it was at the start of the contract. The lessee is liable for any damages caused by their negligence or misuse.
landlordContract.clause10Title: 10. Eviction After Contract Ends and Compensation for Delay
landlordContract.clause10Text: The lessee must vacate the property at the end of the contract term. Any delay is considered illegal occupation, and the lessor can evict the lessee and claim compensation for the period of delay.
landlordContract.clause11Text: The lessee is responsible for paying all utility bills (water, electricity, gas, internet) during the lease term. Failure to pay allows the lessor to take legal action to cover these costs.
landlordContract.clause12Text: If the lessee wishes to terminate the contract early, they must notify the lessor at least one month in advance. Otherwise, they must pay an additional month's rent as a penalty.
landlordContract.clause13Text: The addresses provided in the contract are considered valid for all legal notices, correspondence, and service of process.
landlordContract.clause14Title: 14. Number of Contract Copies and Jurisdiction
landlordContract.clause14Text: The contract is made in two digital copies, one for each party, and is subject to the jurisdiction of the local courts where the property is located.
landlordContract.title: Title
landlordContract.viewOnlyNotice: This contract is not in pending landlord status and is view-only.
landlordContract.certifyText: I certify that I am the legal owner of this property and agree to these terms.
landlordContract.signatureDesc: The contract for {{property}} has been signed by you. We are now notifying the tenant for their final counter-signature.
landlordContract.executionNote: This agreement was digitally executed and timestamped on the HOMI platform.
